title: Modded Expansion
description: A vanilla-aesthetic Forge modpack focused around long-term progression, building, socialization, collaboration, and automation.
body:
![MeepishRealms: Modded Expansion Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e74654a5c4fed890278adf26b82b82c1db922dd.png)

**MeepishRealms: Modded Expansion** is a modpack focused on multiplayer, aesthetic building, tech, magic, and an extended midgame— all built using the experience of previous projects like Atlas and vanilla MeepishRealms. 

[![Available for Forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html) [![See us on GitHub!](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/social/github-plural_vector.svg)](https://github.com/MeepishRealms/Cog) [![Read the Documentation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/documentation/ghpages_vector.svg)](https://github.com/MeepishRealms/Cog/wiki)

# ⚙️ Core Features
### 🔨 Building-First
MR:ME is building-first, meaning almost all our mods enhances the building experience in some way. Automate building blocks and materials using the Create mod, clear out terrain with Spectral Hammer from Iron's Spells and Spellbooks, and unleash your full creative potential with Litematica, Create's schematicannon, and the Axiom mod (creative mode only).

Balancing changes are geared to encourage building! Ice boat and elytra nerfs encourage railways and bridges!

### 🧰 Engineer with Create
Use the Create mod to construct the factory of your dreams! Automate materials, blocks, magic, and more, all in a steampunk aesthetic! Create also allows you to create working elevators, waterwheels, windmills, and more.

### ✨ Magic n' Monsters
Explore wizardry and build your arsenal of spells to take down fearsome bosses! Discover dozens of spells through Iron's Spells and Spellbooks, and vanquish enemies from said mod, Bosses of Mass Destruction, and Cataclysm.

### 🔗 Inter-Mod Integration
Mods are integrated together and balanced using our built-in custom datapack! Automate magical items, use boss drops in mechanical recipes, and use sorcery to gather materials! 

<details>
    <summary>👋 Multiplayer</summary>

MR:ME is built from the ground up for multiplayer gameplay, with loads of features such as,
- Proximity Chat and Sound Physics
- Custom Discs
- Sculk Interaction with Proximity Chat
- Train Navigation System (to easily travel to other bases!)
- Currency and Economy System
- Tweaked Bosses to encourage team fights
- Out-of-the-Box Server Compatibility

### 🌐 Server Hosting
For server providers that support Modrinth modpacks, the pack should work out-of-the-box!

For self-hosters or cloud hosting, we recommend [itzg's Docker Minecraft Server](https://github.com/itzg/docker-minecraft-server) image combined with our pre-made settings. You can use our [Compose](https://github.com/MeepishRealms/Cog/tree/dev/containers/compose) and [Quadlet](https://github.com/MeepishRealms/Cog/tree/dev/containers/quadlet) files that are drag-and-drop to deploy!

</details>

<details>
    <summary>❓ FAQ</summary>
 
See the [wiki](https://github.com/MeepishRealms/Cog/wiki/FAQ) for commonly asked questions regarding progression, [iron ore](https://github.com/MeepishRealms/Cog/wiki/Iron-Ore), installation, and performance fixes.

### 🐛 Getting in Touch
To report issues or suggest changes, submit them on our [GitHub page](https://github.com/MeepishRealms/Cog/issues).

</details>

<details>
    <summary>⚖️ Licensing and Credits</summary>

Nearly all mods in this pack are uploaded on Modrinth. For a list of all mods that are included in the modpack, click the [latest release](https://modrinth.com/modpack/project-cog/version/latest), and see the Dependencies section.

The following mods/resource/data packs are bundled as an override, meaning that they are not distributed by Modrinth's servers, but rather included as a part of the `.mrpack` binary.

- **[B.F. End Cities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bf-end-cities)** by Anthxny
  - The MIT License used by the mod permits redistribution.
  - *Source code avaliable at https://github.com/anthxnymc/BFEndCities*
- **[Bobby Reforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bobby-reforged)** by Anthxny
  - The LGPL-3 used by the mod permits redistribution.
  - *Source code avaliable at https://github.com/anthxnymc/BobbyReforged*
- **[Chimes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chimes)** by BlewberryPie
  - Permission explicitly obtained from Mod Author. See [permission.png](chimes/permission.png).
- **[Collector's Reap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/collectors-reap) by brnbrd**
  - The MIT License used by the mod permits redistribution.
  - *Source code avaliable at https://github.com/brnbrd/CollectorsReap*
- **[Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)** by LainMI
  - The "Minecraft Mod Public License" used by the mod permits redistribution.
  - *Source code avaliable at https://github.com/zlainsama/CosmeticArmorReworked*
- **[Create: Broken Bad](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-broken-bad)** by jetpacker06
  - Permission explicitly obtained from Mod Authors. See [permission1.png](createbb/permission1.png), [permission2.png](createbb/permission2.png), and [permission.png](usableproduct/permission.png).
  - *Source code avaliable at https://github.com/jetpacker06/Create-Broken-Bad*
- **[Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica)** by masady
  - The LGPL-3 used by the mod permits redistribution.
  - *Source code avaliable at https://github.com/maruohon/litematica*
- **[Mighty Mail](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mighty-mail)** by MrCrayfish
  - The MIT License used by the mod permits redistribution.
  - *Source code avaliable at https://github.com/MrCrayfish/MightyMail*
- **[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)** by MrCrayfish
  - The LGPL-2.1 used by the mod permits redistribution.
  - *Source code avaliable at https://github.com/MrCrayfish/Framework*
- **Vanilla Tweaks**: https://vanillatweaks.net/

This modpack itself is licensed under the GPLv3 and you are free to fork, redistribute, and use the code.
</details>
